title: Wasted Eggs
overview: Junko is nearly 30, nearing the traditional 'best before' of the Japanese society, and feels increasing pressure: without a partner candidate or even a particular wish to have children anytime soon, she decides to become an egg donor.

trailers.title: WASTED EGGS Trailer PÖFF 2018
trailers.channel_name: PÖFF | Tallinn Black Nights Film Festival
